title: icacorea guadalupensis
intro: Icacorea guadalupensis, also known as the Guadalupensis shrub, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Icacorea guadalupensis are said to include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and promoting wound healing, among other uses. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
